title: Senior Software Engineer - ECIL - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - ECIL - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at ECIL. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Ahmedabad-based team.

About ECIL:
ECIL is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ECIL!
